segments.text: The dair spam shuts down the player's KO mixups
segments.original_text: 選手の撃墜択を通させてくれない空下暴れ

segments.text: And here comes the nair as expected
If the second hit connects too, that's really valuable
segments.original_text: 2段目も当たればかなりおいしい

segments.text: Up throw is the KO here
segments.original_text: ここは上投げで撃墜ですね

full_text: The dair spam shuts down the player's KO mixups Bair mashing Aggressive option And here comes the nair as expected If the second hit connects too, that's really valuable Up throw is the KO here

corrections.original: 選手の撃墜タクを通させてくれない空中下暴れ
corrections.corrected: 選手の撃墜択を通させてくれない空下暴れ
corrections.rule: Kanji/abbreviation: タク→択, 空中下→空下
Move abbreviation: 空中後ろ→空後

corrections.original: さあやはり空中ニュートラル
corrections.rule: Move abbreviation: 空中ニュートラル→空N
